currentLinkedIn.headline: ML Engineer at Nexus AI | LLM Serving · MLOps · Python | Bangalore
currentLinkedIn.about: I operationalise machine learning — from prototype notebook to production inference endpoint. Four years shipping ML systems at scale in the APAC market.

experience.title: ML Engineer
bullets: Reduced LLM inference latency from 1.8s to 320ms by implementing speculative decoding and KV-cache tuning
Built a model registry and automated retraining pipeline that reduced manual deployment effort by 70%
Deployed fine-tuned sentence-transformer models serving 2M+ embedding requests per day

experience.title: Data Engineer
bullets: Designed Spark-based ETL pipelines processing 40GB of daily event data for ML feature generation
Implemented data-quality checks that caught schema drift issues before they reached model training
